ksa_text: Knowledge of data and AI organizational design patterns, including centralized CoE, federated, and hub-and-spoke models, and the conditions under which each is appropriate.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Excluded on seniority grounds: the knowledge contains explicit executive/organizational scope signals ('organizational design'), placing it above IC-to-senior-IC Data Engineer level. STRM composite score is strong (0.4210, top tier for this dataset); semantic alignment with data frameworks may be present, but the described responsibilities involve setting or leading organizational programs rather than executing technical data work. Data Engineers implement within structures they do not establish.

pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: External validation confirms exclusion: 0 match(es) in DE job postings or certification curricula. A gap here would not be noticeable to a working Data Engineer focused on pipeline, modeling, and data platform responsibilities.
